age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. in Ocean Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Robotics, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related disciplines with valid GATE score
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. in Ocean Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Robotics, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related disciplines. Strong academic record and a valid GATE score (in any of the affiliated disciplines listed above).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. degree in relevant engineering disciplines and have a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Junior Research Fellow recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by a test or interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Madras is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q10. In which city and state is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600036.
